captions_untagged.explicit: Performing as a lead singer in this band has been my main professional focus for years, and nights like this remind me exactly why I do it. Working with these musicians is such a rewarding career move.
captions_untagged.moderate: Between our actual day jobs, the band is mostly just one of those serious hobbies we refuse to let go of. Even when the setlist gets exhausting, I wouldn't trade these weekend gigs for anything.
captions_untagged.no_leak: There is nothing quite like the energy of a live set once the room is finally packed. Grateful for every second spent on stage tonight, even with the technical chaos behind the scenes.
